identity.fantasy: A tiny ninja cat who braces through a slow, readable tell, then answers one mistimed close-range strike with a compact, powerful body counter.
silhouette: Pointed charcoal ninja hood that reads as upright cat ears
Short symmetrical crimson scarf tails around a compact feline body
Low planted stance with oversized cream paw wraps and a visible cat tail tip

primary.name: Ninja Ready Stance
primary.counterplay: Step inside during the visible hand draw, force the weapon event, then punish the two open recovery frames.
primary.interruption: If Naru is interrupted before frame 3, no weapon event is emitted and simulation selects hurt or launch.

ability.name: Stone-Paw Reversal
ability.description: Naru plants both feet through a long brace. Only an incoming close strike on frame 4 arms the reversal; simulation resolves the heavy counter exactly on frame 5.
ability.counterplay: Recognize the crossed-paw brace, withhold the strike for one frame, jump or remain outside the short counter reach, then punish frames 6 through 8.
ability.interruption: Before frame 4 Naru can be interrupted normally and spends no counter. A strike outside frame 4 does not arm the hit on frame 5.

weaknesses: The one-frame counter window is preceded by four readable startup frames and followed by three punishable recovery frames.
Naru has short effective reach and no body-sheet projectile, so patient spacing denies the character's main job.

artBrief.spriteSheet: Painterly clean-HD side-view body-only character. One independent right-facing multi-row grid per state, 256x256 runtime cells, row-major order, transparent runtime PNG, normalized feet-center pivot at x=0.5 y=0.9.
artBrief.windUpCue: For Stone-Paw Reversal, Naru sinks low for four frames, crosses the oversized wrapped paws, and pulls the crimson scarf taut before the one-frame counter window.
artBrief.impactCue: Frame 5 snaps the compact torso and lead paw forward with a sharp full-body recoil; counter flash, impact burst, sound, and screen feedback remain separate event-driven assets.
artBrief.recoveryCue: Naru overextends, one knee touches down, both paws open, and the scarf falls slack through three visibly punishable frames.
avoid: Named franchise characters, assets, logos, terminology, silhouettes, or move lists
Sword, shuriken, weapon, projectile, impact, dust, trail, text, logo, or detached VFX baked into body sheets
Side-specific emblems or costume asymmetry that becomes incorrect when mirrored
Tiny facial detail, realistic anatomy, black-on-black unreadable shapes, crop, or frame-to-frame identity drift

stateTransitions: idle|walk -> jump_start -> rise -> fall -> land -> idle
implementationNotes.notes: Simulation owns counter arming, hit evaluation, weapon spawn, knockback, cooldown, interruption, and transitions. Renderer only displays the selected Naru frame and event-driven cosmetics. Species is a small ninja cat; body sheets remain weapon-free.
